questions.q: A lily pad doubles in size every day. On day 48 it covers the entire lake. On which day was the lake exactly half-covered?
A bat and a ball together cost $1.10. The bat costs $1.00 more than the ball. How much does the ball cost?

A cyclist rides 1 mile uphill at 15 mph. How fast must they ride the 1-mile downhill to average 30 mph for the full 2-mile trip?
choices: It is impossible — no speed is fast enough
